name: vortos/vortos-analytics-posthog
description: PostHog driver for vortos/vortos-analytics — server-side /batch HTTP ingestion. Implements the agnostic AnalyticsInterface; registers via its own DependencyInjection package; passes the core conformance TCK unchanged.

suggest.vortos/vortos-alerts: Optional: reuses the Block 17 SsrfGuard for the curl transport's egress hardening. Guarded by class_exists().
